name: orionx
description: Connect Codex to a scoped OrionX instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped OrionX tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to OrionX through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so OrionX Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use OrionX only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
